title: SynthesisRecord
description: Synthesis output per spec §19. Hybrid synthesis: common path plus preserved material difference blocks (§19.1, §19.3). Preserves the §19.11 minimum output structure.

synthesisId.description: Unique identifier for this synthesis record.

sessionId.description: Optional session from which the synthesis was derived.

commonPath.description: Current synthesized common path (§19.2, §19.11 first bullet). Captures the strongest shared workflow path at same-level synthesis.

differenceBlocks.description: Preserved material difference blocks per §19.3. Temporary structured synthesis objects — not yet final contradictions.

where.description: Where the difference appears in the workflow (§19.3).

whyMatters.description: Why the difference matters (§19.3, §19.4 material-impact criteria).

laterClosurePath.description: What later closure path may resolve it (§19.3, §19.7 enrichment).

escalationCandidates.description: Escalation candidates when relevant (§19.11 fifth bullet, §19.7 supervisor/manager enrichment).

confidenceEvidenceNotes.description: Confidence and evidence notes where important (§19.11 sixth bullet).
